title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
Ellery Queen calculates that Professor Yadley might intercept the fugitive, Crocker, in Indianapolis. However, upon arriving at the Indianapolis airport at 8:30, Ellery receives a note from Yadley explaining that he missed Crocker, who had already flown to Chicago on a 7:15 flight. Yadley suggests that if Ellery reaches the Chicago airport by 8:45, he should coordinate with the police to arrest the man.

Ellery calls the Chicago police commissioner, identifying himself as the son of Detective Richard Queen. He requests that the police follow the tall, dark-skinned man with a bandaged wrist without alerting him, suggesting they only arrest him when he attempts to leave Chicago. He also asks the police to assist Professor Yadley upon his arrival.

Ellery flies to Chicago and lands at the airport, where he is met by a group including Professor Yadley, the Chicago Police Commissioner, and his father, Detective Richard Quincannon. Quincannon explains he traveled from New York after being notified by a police chief in Cynthiana that Ellery was his son. The Commissioner informs Ellery that Crocker landed around 8:45 without suspicion and has since taken a taxi to the Rockford Inn, where he is currently being monitored by four police cars. Shortly after, Detective Vane and Prosecutor Easom arrive in Chicago. The group gathers in a room at the Rockford Hotel, where Vane expresses frustration at the fugitive's ability to stay ahead of them.
